body:
Adds monthly budgets to the expense tracker: per-category spending limits, an async over-budget check, and a budget-aware monthly report.

- new `Budget.kt`: `BudgetTracker` (limits + over-budget checks), `BudgetAlerts` (fan-out check across categories)
- `report monthly` now prints a budget-aware monthly summary alongside the existing breakdown
- new `TRANSPORT` category
- new `budget <limits-file>` subcommand to load limits and print alerts

No behavior change for the existing `add`/`report`/`import`/`remove` commands.
title: feat: add budgets and monthly report
